eligibility.notes: Small and marginal farmers with cultivable land

benefit: ₹6,000 per year (₹2,000 every 4 months) directly in bank account
description_hi: छोटे और सीमांत किसानों को हर साल ₹6,000 सीधे बैंक खाते में मिलते हैं।
demo_story: Ramesh, 55, farmer from Kangra — gets ₹6,000/year just for being a farmer

name_hi: आयुष्मान भारत प्रधानमंत्री जन आरोग्य योजना

eligibility.notes: BPL/SECC listed families. No income certificate needed if listed.

benefit: ₹5 lakh per year free health insurance at any empanelled hospital
description_hi: गरीब परिवारों को किसी भी सरकारी या चुने हुए अस्पताल में ₹5 लाख तक मुफ्त इलाज मिलता है।
demo_story: Sunita's mother needs surgery — Ayushman covers ₹5 lakh, zero cost

eligibility.notes: BPL household adult woman without LPG connection

benefit: Free LPG gas cylinder connection + first refill free
description_hi: गरीब घरों की महिलाओं को मुफ्त गैस कनेक्शन मिलता है ताकि चूल्हे का धुआं न हो।
demo_story: Kamla from Mandi cooks on wood smoke — Ujjwala gives her a free gas connection

eligibility.notes: All farmers growing notified crops.

benefit: Crop insurance — if crop fails due to drought/flood/pest, get compensation up to full sum insured
description_hi: अगर बारिश, सूखे, या कीड़ों से फसल खराब हो जाए तो मुआवजा मिलता है।
demo_story: Apple orchard in Shimla destroyed by hail — PMFBY compensates the farmer

eligibility.notes: Any farmer who owns or leases land

benefit: Short-term credit up to ₹3 lakh at 4% interest rate (after subsidy)
description_hi: किसानों को खेती के खर्च के लिए कम ब्याज पर ₹3 लाख तक का कर्ज मिलता है।
demo_story: Ramesh needs money to buy seeds and fertilizer — KCC gives him ₹3 lakh at 4%

eligibility.notes: Houseless or dilapidated house families in rural areas

benefit: ₹1.3 lakh (hilly states like HP) to build a pucca house
description_hi: ग्रामीण गरीबों को पक्का घर बनाने के लिए ₹1.3 लाख तक की मदद मिलती है।
demo_story: Family in Kullu lives in a broken mud house — PMAY gives ₹1.3 lakh to build pucca home

eligibility.notes: For girl child below 10 years. Account by parent/guardian.

benefit: High-interest savings account (8.2% p.a.) for girl's education and marriage
description_hi: बेटी के लिए पोस्ट ऑफिस में खाता खुलता है जिसमें 8.2% ब्याज मिलता है।
demo_story: Parents open Sukanya account for 5-year-old daughter — money grows at 8.2% for her education

eligibility.notes: Non-farm micro and small enterprise owners. No collateral for up to ₹10 lakh.

benefit: Business loan: Shishu (₹50K), Kishore (₹5L), Tarun (₹10L) — no collateral
description_hi: छोटा व्यापार शुरू करने के लिए बिना गारंटी के ₹10 लाख तक का लोन मिलता है।
demo_story: Meera wants to open a stitching shop — MUDRA gives her ₹50,000 with no collateral

eligibility.notes: Indian youth who are school/college dropout or seeking employment

benefit: Free skill training in 40+ trades + ₹8,000 reward on certification
description_hi: युवाओं को मुफ्त में हुनर सिखाया जाता है और पास होने पर ₹8,000 भी मिलते हैं।
demo_story: Vikram, 22, dropout — PMKVY trains him as electrician for free + ₹8,000 reward

eligibility.notes: Any person with a bank account

benefit: ₹2 lakh accident insurance for only ₹20 per year
description_hi: सिर्फ ₹20 साल में देकर दुर्घटना में ₹2 लाख का बीमा मिलता है।
demo_story: A daily labourer gets ₹2 lakh accident coverage for just ₹20/year

eligibility.notes: Any person with a savings bank account

benefit: ₹2 lakh life insurance for ₹436 per year
description_hi: ₹436 साल में देकर ₹2 लाख का जीवन बीमा मिलता है।
demo_story: If a farmer dies, his family gets ₹2 lakh for just ₹436/year premium

eligibility.notes: Unorganized sector workers. Not an income tax payer.

benefit: Guaranteed monthly pension of ₹1,000–₹5,000 after age 60
description_hi: छोटा पैसा जमा करें, 60 साल बाद हर महीने पेंशन मिलेगी।
demo_story: Young farm worker contributes ₹42/month — gets ₹1,000 pension every month at 60

benefit: ₹200–₹500/month central + HP adds ₹700 more (total ₹900–₹1,200/month in HP)
description_hi: 60 साल से ऊपर के गरीब बुजुर्गों को हर महीने पेंशन मिलती है।
demo_story: Dadi, 68, BPL — gets monthly pension for basic survival

eligibility.notes: Women, SC, or ST entrepreneurs starting a new business

benefit: Bank loan from ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore for greenfield enterprises
description_hi: महिलाओं और SC/ST को नया व्यापार शुरू करने के लिए ₹1 करोड़ तक का बैंक लोन मिलता है।
demo_story: Savita, a Dalit woman, gets ₹15 lakh loan to open a dairy farm

eligibility.notes: Girl children in select districts

benefit: Scholarships, school incentives, ₹5,000 merit award for girl students
description_hi: बेटियों की पढ़ाई और उनके अधिकारों के लिए सरकार की मुख्य योजना।
demo_story: 12-year-old Priya in a government school gets scholarship to continue education

eligibility.notes: SC/ST/OBC/Minority students

benefit: ₹1,200 to ₹10,000+ per year depending on course and category
description_hi: 11वीं के बाद SC/ST/OBC/अल्पसंख्यक छात्रों को छात्रवृत्ति मिलती है।
demo_story: Mohan, SC student, needs college fees — NSP scholarship covers ₹8,000/year

eligibility.notes: Urban street vendors with vending certificate

benefit: Collateral-free loan: ₹10,000 → ₹20,000 → ₹50,000 with each cycle
description_hi: रेहड़ी-पटरी वालों को बिना गारंटी ₹10,000 से ₹50,000 तक का लोन मिलता है।
demo_story: Pushpa sells vegetables on a cart — SVAnidhi gives her ₹10,000 to grow her business

name_hi: महात्मा गांधी राष्ट्रीय ग्रामीण रोजगार गारंटी

eligibility.notes: Any adult rural household member willing to do unskilled manual work

benefit: 100 days guaranteed employment per year at ₹230–₹290/day (HP rate)
description_hi: गांव में रहने वाले किसी भी वयस्क को साल में 100 दिन काम और मजदूरी की गारंटी है।
demo_story: Gita from Mandi gets 100 days of guaranteed work near her home at ₹250/day

eligibility.notes: Automatic for all enrolled children

benefit: Free hot meal every school day
description_hi: सरकारी स्कूलों में पढ़ने वाले बच्चों को हर दिन मुफ्त पका हुआ खाना मिलता है।
demo_story: Every child in a government school gets a free nutritious meal daily — automatically

eligibility.notes: Children 0-6 years, pregnant women, nursing mothers

benefit: Free nutrition, immunisation, health check-up, pre-school education
description_hi: 6 साल से छोटे बच्चों और गर्भवती महिलाओं को आंगनवाड़ी में मुफ्त पोषण और टीके मिलते हैं।
demo_story: Seema, pregnant in Dharamsala — Anganwadi gives her nutrition support for free

eligibility.notes: All TB patients registered at government health facilities

benefit: ₹500 per month + free treatment for entire TB treatment duration
description_hi: TB के मरीजों को मुफ्त दवाई और हर महीने ₹500 पोषण सहायता मिलती है।
demo_story: TB patient in Shimla gets free medicines + ₹500/month for nutrition during treatment

eligibility.notes: Pregnant BPL/SC/ST women delivering in government hospitals

benefit: ₹1,400 cash incentive + free delivery at government hospital
description_hi: सरकारी अस्पताल में बच्चे के जन्म पर महिला को ₹1,400 तक नकद प्रोत्साहन मिलता है।
demo_story: Sunita delivers her baby in government hospital — gets ₹1,400 cash and free delivery

eligibility.notes: First-time pregnant/nursing mothers

benefit: ₹5,000 in three installments for first child
description_hi: पहले बच्चे की गर्भावस्था में तीन किस्तों में ₹5,000 की आर्थिक मदद मिलती है।
demo_story: First-time mother Rekha gets ₹5,000 in three installments during pregnancy

eligibility.notes: Existing micro enterprises wanting to expand. No collateral.

benefit: Loan up to ₹10 lakh at low interest, no collateral required
description_hi: मौजूदा छोटा व्यापार बड़ा करने के लिए बिना गारंटी ₹10 लाख तक का लोन मिलता है।
demo_story: Tailor with 3 machines expands to 10 machines — MUDRA Tarun gives ₹10 lakh no-collateral loan

eligibility.notes: Any Indian citizen without a bank account. Zero minimum balance.

benefit: Free zero-balance bank account + ₹10,000 overdraft + ₹2 lakh accident insurance
description_hi: बिना न्यूनतम राशि के बैंक खाता + ₹2 लाख दुर्घटना बीमा मिलता है।
demo_story: Village woman with no bank account — Jan Dhan opens free account with ₹2 lakh accident cover

eligibility.notes: Unorganised sector workers earning below ₹15,000/month

benefit: Free registration + ₹2 lakh accident insurance + priority in govt schemes

demo_story: Construction worker registers free on e-shram.gov.in — instantly gets ₹2 lakh accident cover

name_hi: राष्ट्रीय ग्रामीण आजीविका मिशन SHG ऋण

eligibility.notes: Rural women who form Self-Help Groups of 10-15 members

benefit: ₹1.5–10 lakh low-interest group loan + free training
description_hi: गांव की महिलाएं 10-15 का समूह बनाकर ₹10 लाख तक का सस्ता लोन और मुफ्त प्रशिक्षण पा सकती हैं।
demo_story: 10 women in Mandi village form SHG — together they get ₹5 lakh loan to start a pickle business

eligibility.notes: 18 traditional artisan trades

benefit: ₹15,000 free tool kit + skill training + ₹3 lakh loan at 5% interest
description_hi: कारीगरों को मुफ्त औजार किट, ट्रेनिंग और 5% ब्याज पर ₹3 लाख तक का कर्ज मिलता है।
demo_story: Village carpenter gets free tool kit worth ₹15,000 + low-interest ₹3 lakh loan

name_hi: मुफ्त राशन प्रधानमंत्री गरीब कल्याण अन्न योजना

eligibility.notes: Anyone with a valid ration card. 80 crore beneficiaries.

benefit: 5 kg free wheat/rice per person per month (through 2029)
description_hi: राशन कार्ड वाले गरीब परिवारों को हर व्यक्ति 5 किलो मुफ्त अनाज हर महीने मिलता है।
demo_story: BPL family of 5 gets 25 kg free grain every month — no cost at all

eligibility.notes: Family income below ₹1.5 lakh

benefit: ₹12,000 per year for 4 years (class 9-12)
description_hi: सरकारी स्कूल के गरीब बच्चों को 9वीं से 12वीं तक ₹12,000 सालाना छात्रवृत्ति मिलती है।
demo_story: Ramu, class 8, government school — NMMS gives ₹1,000/month for 4 years to keep studying

eligibility.notes: HP residents NOT covered under Ayushman Bharat — unorganised sector, daily wage workers

benefit: ₹5 lakh per year health coverage in HP empanelled hospitals
description_hi: हिमाचल प्रदेश के वे निवासी जिन्हें आयुष्मान नहीं मिला, उन्हें ₹5 लाख का स्वास्थ्य बीमा मिलता है।
demo_story: Daily wage worker in Shimla not covered by Ayushman — Himcare covers ₹5 lakh treatment

eligibility.notes: Girl child born after 2006. BPL families.

benefit: ₹12,000 one-time deposit at birth + ₹300–₹1,200 scholarship/year from class 1 to 12
description_hi: हिमाचल में BPL परिवार की बेटी के जन्म पर ₹12,000 और हर साल पढ़ाई के लिए छात्रवृत्ति मिलती है।
demo_story: Lakshmi, BPL family in Kangra, has a newborn daughter — Beti Hai Anmol gives ₹12,000 + annual scholarship

eligibility.notes: HP youth starting micro/small enterprise

benefit: 25–35% subsidy on project cost up to ₹60 lakh for new HP business

demo_story: Rahul, 25, from Mandi wants to open a bakery — Swavalamban gives 35% subsidy on ₹10 lakh project

eligibility.notes: Serious chronic illness: cancer, kidney failure, Parkinson's, hemophilia, thalassemia, liver failure

benefit: ₹3,000 per month for patients with serious diseases
description_hi: गंभीर बीमारी से पीड़ित हिमाचल के मरीज को हर महीने ₹3,000 की आर्थिक मदद मिलती है।
demo_story: Shyam's wife has cancer in Bilaspur — Sahara Yojana gives ₹3,000/month for her care

eligibility.notes: HP students preparing for IIT-JEE, NEET, CLAT, UPSC, SSC

benefit: Up to ₹1 lakh/year for coaching at premier institutes
description_hi: IIT-JEE, NEET की तैयारी के लिए गरीब HP छात्रों को ₹1 लाख तक कोचिंग का खर्च मिलता है।
demo_story: Anjali from Solan wants to crack NEET — Medha Protsahan pays ₹1 lakh for coaching

eligibility.notes: HP women without LPG connection not covered under Ujjwala

benefit: Free LPG gas connection + one free cylinder
description_hi: जिन हिमाचल की महिलाओं को उज्ज्वला नहीं मिला, उन्हें मुफ्त गैस कनेक्शन और सिलेंडर मिलता है।
demo_story: Leela in Kullu cooks on firewood — HP Grihini Suvidha gives her a free LPG connection

benefit: ₹850–₹1,500 per month (central + HP top-up)
description_hi: हिमाचल के 60 साल से ऊपर के बुजुर्गों को हर महीने ₹850 से ₹1,500 तक पेंशन मिलती है।
demo_story: Dada, 70, in Hamirpur gets ₹1,500/month pension to meet daily needs

benefit: ₹850 per month
description_hi: हिमाचल की विधवाओं को हर महीने ₹850 पेंशन मिलती है।
demo_story: Geeta lost her husband — HP Widow Pension gives her ₹850/month for survival

benefit: ₹850–₹1,500/month + free assistive devices
description_hi: 40% से ज्यादा विकलांगता वाले हिमाचल के लोगों को हर महीने पेंशन और मुफ्त उपकरण मिलते हैं।
demo_story: Raju with 60% disability in Una gets ₹1,500/month + free wheelchair

eligibility.notes: HP families not in PMAY-G with no pucca house

benefit: ₹1.5 lakh assistance to construct/repair a house
description_hi: PMAY से वंचित हिमाचल के परिवारों को घर बनाने के लिए ₹1.5 लाख की मदद मिलती है।
demo_story: Birsa family in Chamba not in PMAY list — CM Awas Yojana gives ₹1.5 lakh for their home

benefit: 50–85% subsidy on anti-hail nets, irrigation, cold storage, plant material
description_hi: हिमाचल के बागवानों को सेब और फलों की खेती पर 85% तक सब्सिडी मिलती है।
demo_story: Suresh's apple orchard damaged by hail — Bagwani Yojana gives 85% subsidy on anti-hail net

eligibility.notes: Orphans, destitute children, widows in extreme poverty, elderly without support in HP

benefit: ₹4,000/month + free housing + educational scholarships for orphans
description_hi: अनाथ बच्चों, बेसहारा विधवाओं को ₹4,000 प्रति माह और मुफ्त रहने की व्यवस्था मिलती है।
demo_story: 12-year-old orphan Ravi in Solan gets ₹4,000/month + free education under CM Sukh Aashray

benefit: ₹5,000 to ₹25,000 merit scholarship for top-performing students
description_hi: हिमाचल के सरकारी स्कूलों में अच्छे अंक लाने पर ₹25,000 तक की छात्रवृत्ति मिलती है।
demo_story: Kajal scored 92% in class 10 government school — gets ₹10,000 merit scholarship

benefit: Crop insurance for apple/fruit crops at highly subsidised premium — up to 80% premium subsidised
description_hi: हिमाचल के सेब और फल किसानों की फसल का बीमा बहुत कम प्रीमियम पर होता है।
demo_story: Apple farmer in Kinnaur pays tiny premium — hail destroys crop but insurance covers the loss

eligibility.education: Class 12 passed from HP Board with 70%+

benefit: Free laptop to top-performing Class 12 students
description_hi: 12वीं में 70% से ज्यादा अंक लाने वाले हिमाचल के छात्रों को मुफ्त लैपटॉप मिलता है।
demo_story: Pooja scored 78% in HP board — she gets a free laptop to continue her education

eligibility.notes: HP farmers or unemployed youth wanting to grow mushrooms

benefit: Up to 50% subsidy on mushroom spawn, equipment, compost unit
description_hi: मशरूम उगाने के लिए हिमाचल में 50% तक सब्सिडी मिलती है।
demo_story: Unemployed Monika starts mushroom farming at home — HP gives 50% subsidy on setup

eligibility.notes: HP rural families with a spare room willing to host tourists

benefit: Up to ₹2 lakh grant + official HP Tourism registration + priority listing
description_hi: हिमाचल में घर में पर्यटकों को ठहराने पर ₹2 लाख तक की मदद और सरकारी पंजीकरण मिलता है।
demo_story: Family in Spiti opens their home to tourists — HP registers them and gives ₹2 lakh setup grant

name_en: HP Rajiv Gandhi Mahila Kisan Yojana
benefit: Free training, seeds, fertilizer kits + 50% subsidy on farming tools
description_hi: हिमाचल की महिला किसानों को मुफ्त बीज, खाद और कृषि उपकरणों पर 50% सब्सिडी मिलती है।
demo_story: Shanti, a woman farmer in Kangra, gets free seeds + 50% off on farming tools

benefit: ₹1.5 lakh grant for house construction
description_hi: हिमाचल के SC/ST परिवारों को पक्का घर बनाने के लिए ₹1.5 लाख अनुदान मिलता है।
demo_story: Mala, a Dalit woman in Sirmaur, gets ₹1.5 lakh grant to build her family's first pucca house

eligibility.notes: HP families especially tribal wanting to start sheep/goat rearing

benefit: 50% subsidy on purchase of sheep/goats (min 10 animals) + free veterinary support
description_hi: हिमाचल में भेड़-बकरी पालने के लिए 50% सब्सिडी और मुफ्त पशु चिकित्सा सेवा मिलती है।
demo_story: Tribal family in Kinnaur starts goat rearing — HP pays 50% of the cost of 20 goats
